s: In 1977, Mike Paxton suited up for BOS as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.830, WHIP 1.470, SO 58, WAR 2.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> CLE).
In 1978, Mike Paxton suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.860, WHIP 1.270, SO 96, WAR 2.700. Notable context: Joined CLE.
